MARKET PRICES

Porsche Boxster S - Manual - 986 (2000 to 2004)

CMB $17,424

The CLASSIC.COM Market Benchmark (CMB) represents a benchmark value for vehicles in this market based on data accumulated by CLASSIC.COM. Actual market value for a specific vehicle will depend on various elements, including the condition of the vehicle.
NOT FOLLOWING
The Porsche Boxster S of the 986 generation was launched for model year 2000. The base model 986 had been launched in 19...

The Porsche Boxster S of the 986 generation was launched for model year 2000. The base model 986 had been launched in 1997. The Boxster S was introduced with a 3.2-litre engine rated at 185 kW (253 PS; 250 hp). For model year 2003, it would see some minor styling updates and a slight power increase to 191 kW (260 PS; 258 hp). Its direct successor was the Porsche Boxster S of the 987 generation introduced in 2005. 

Porsche Boxster S - Manual - 986 FAQs

Q: What is the highest sale price of a Porsche Boxster - 986 - S Manual?

A: The highest recorded sale was $40,500 for a 2003 Porsche Boxster S 4.0L 6-Speed on September 09, 2022.

Q: What is the lowest sale price of a Porsche Boxster - 986 - S Manual?

A: The lowest recorded sale price was $5,100 for a 2001 Porsche (986) Boxster S on July 01, 2024.

Q: What is the average sale price of a Porsche Boxster - 986 - S Manual?

A: The average price of a Porsche Boxster - 986 - S Manual is $17,715.

Q: When was the Porsche Boxster - 986 - S Manual produced?

A: The Porsche Boxster - 986 - S Manual was produced for model years 2000 to 2004.

Have another FAQ about the Porsche Boxster S - Manual - 986? .
Learn more at
Wikipedia
Model years for Porsche Boxster S - Manual - 986 (2000 to 2004)
  • 2000
  • 2001
  • 2002
  • 2003
  • 2004
